title: SQL to MAL listing looses types
key_bug_features: SQL to MAL listing type loss during table creation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "sys"."author" ("id" SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, "name" VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, "birthdate" DATE);
CREATE TABLE "sys"."book" ("id" INTEGER, "title" VARCHAR(100), "author_id" INTEGER REFERENCES "sys"."author"("id"));
SELECT b."title", a."name" FROM "sys"."book" b JOIN "sys"."author" a ON b."author_id" = a."id" WHERE a."birthdate" IS NOT NULL;
